ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "participant_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student participating in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the student participated in */,
  "event_role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the event (e.g., participant, team member) */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the student is part of */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* Is the student the team lead? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant securing the achievement */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award or recognition */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position secured in the event (e.g., 1st Place, Runner Up) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Competition, Workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation log */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student participating */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event participated in */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation in the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the student (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participation_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participation_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which feedback is provided */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant giving feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
